title: 美国防部将Anthropic永久逐出大楼
full_text:

Holy, Dario really hasn't made any friends lately.
Pete Hegseth

Jun 13
Three months ago, @ DeptofWar kicked @ AnthropicAI out of our building—forever.
Every passing day proves why that was the right move. 🇺🇸
Readers added context
This official statement is not accurate or truthful. The DOW didn’t kick out Anthropic “forever.” They invited Anthropic back when they launched the Mythos model — They even continued to use Mythos in high-stakes military ops.
